entry.title: Code Red
entry.summary:
Author: Maybe_Here

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,516Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 309

Summary: Flatmates can be a real gamble. Sometimes they're normal. Sometimes they wear masks and wield guns. You move to Gotham to start at a new job at the General Hospital, but with limited options you have to move into a sketchy apartment.

entry.title: Good Luck, Babe!
entry.summary:
Author: VenusCrytrap

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 173,008Chapters: 33/?Kudos: 3,436

Summary: A decade after washing out of your mask, you try to piece together a decent life as Bruce Wayne's only civillian adoptee. Your father believes that you deserve more than what the manor has to offer. If only his wards got the memo.

entry.title: The Way You See Me
entry.summary:
Author: Xivkyn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,037Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 105

Summary: After being an experiment to Hugo Strange for the majority of your life you finally escape. The trauma of your time there follows you as you remember the screams and death all around you. You don't even know your own name as the number 'Seven' was the only semblance of a name you were given. You have no one to go home to and nothing you look forward to except for revenge. It consumes your every thought ever since you escaped. You want him to feel the pain he caused you and your friends.Limited y/n usage

entry.summary:
Author: midnights_blues

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,456Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

entry.title: Sympathy for the Lost
entry.summary:
Author: lllocalrynn

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,116Chapters: 2/12Kudos: 5

Summary: The Redhood takes Gotham's city by firestorm, cleaning up streets and controlling crime with efficiency, cruel for the wrong but a savior for the innocent. Batman knows who's under the helmet and knows he's coming for the laughing clown, meanwhile you find yourself caught up in a world of crime, and lies... all because you let a troubled guy with unhealed past, named Jason Todd lived in your building, and ultimately in your heart.

entry.title: Unlocked
entry.summary:
Author: Justcallme_po

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,075Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 5

Summary: In Gotham, leaving a door unlocked should be considered a mistake. For you, it became a ritual — one you waited for with equal parts fear and longing. Every Thursday, Jason Todd finds his way back to your apartment after patrol: bruised, exhausted, and carrying more wounds than he’s willing to admit. You both know how to survive. How to brace yourselves for the pain before it comes. How to live with loss. But after spending so long preparing yourselves to lose everything… Do either of you really know what it means to stay?

entry.title: The Bloom Knot
entry.summary:
Author: nocteris

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 56,293Chapters: 16/30Kudos: 185

Summary: It took one accidental shove and a falling pitcher of orange juice on his twenty-sixth birthday for Jason Peter Todd to finally soul bond with a person. Everything seemed brighter, clearer whenever you were around. Only, there were three massive problems. One, you were his student for the semester. Add the fact that you were now roommates with Damian, which complicated things a lot. Two, being apart causes actual physical side effects. Any plans involving ignoring each other was not going to work. Three, was the existence of a certain Conner Luthor-Kent in your life. So, the only logical thing to do was keep you at arm's length while finding a way to break the bond. But between late night motorcycle rides, and accidental library dates against your better judgement, suddenly the both of you weren’t so sure where the line between acquaintances ended and soulmates began.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Burn Rate (Red Hood and you) - Translated
entry.summary:
Author: Vandall

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,809Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 3

Summary: If they think I'm just another cog in their corrupt machine, they're sorely mistaken. My name is ___, and I'm the flame that's here to ignite Gotham, to finally take down those politicians who are only good for stealing while wearing their suits and ties. That's why I love watching them explode! The problem with playing with fire in a city in ruins is that sooner or later you run into the owner of the lighter, and while sometimes it's in my hands... other times it belongs to the gorgeous guy in the red helmet. I've been obsessed with him for almost a year now, wondering: Will you ever be mine, Red Hood? I hope so!

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Time makes you bolder
entry.summary:
Author: TheEndIsNeverTheEnd

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,564Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Why do we change so much when you grow up. From Afraid children to Scary Adults, life takes the best of us down the worst path's as punishment for being born. you didn't chose to be born into a rich family just as Jason didn't chose to be born in crime alley.yet life takes you both in 2 different directions that are interwoven. A girl who loses everything, to find herself down a path of crime when she has such a bright future.to a boy who was blessed with escaping crime alley to die at a time when the ones around him needed him the most. only to come back with anger. Will Jason realise he's hunting down his childhood friend, Will the truth ruin everything, or is it what's needed to finally find peace. (im terrible at writing summaries sorry, first chapter might feel rushed but there will be flashbacks.)
